In Brief

Posted:

11:54 AM PST · February 14, 2025

![Musk says looking to bring Tesla and Starlink to India after meeting with PM Modi](https://techcrunch.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/GettyImages-1258742140.jpg?w=1024)**Image Credits:** Nathan Laine/Bloomberg / Getty Images

- ![Kyle Wiggers](https://techcrunch.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/Kyle-Wiggers.jpg)

- [Kyle Wiggers](https://techcrunch.com/author/kyle-wiggers/)

# Elon Musk’s AI company, xAI, said to be in talks to raise $10B

Elon Musk’s AI company, xAI, is said to be in talks to raise $10 billion in a round that would value xAI at $75 billion.

[Bloomberg reported Friday](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-02-14/musk-s-xai-discussing-10-billion-raise-at-75-billion-valuation) that xAI is canvassing existing investors, including Sequoia Capital, Andreessen Horowitz, and Valor Equity Partners for the round, which would bring xAI’s total raised to $22.4 billion, according to Crunchbase. Bloomberg also noted that discussions are ongoing and that the terms of the fundraising round may change.

The potential new injection of capital comes as xAI reportedly [weighs buying more than $5 billion worth of servers from Dell](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-02-14/dell-nears-deal-with-musk-s-xai-for-5-billion-in-servers-with-nvidia-chips) to support the development of its AI technologies, including its [Grok models](https://techcrunch.com/2024/03/29/what-is-elon-musks-grok-chatbot-and-how-does-it-work/). Grok powers a growing number of features on Elon Musk’s X social network, including summaries of trending discussions.

The next major version of Grok, Grok 3, is set to be released in the next several weeks, [Musk said in a livestreamed appearance at a Dubai technology conference this week](https://www.reuters.com/technology/artificial-intelligence/elon-musk-says-grok-3-final-stages-outperforming-all-chatbots-2025-02-13/).

Topics
